assessor_1_raw: Re-evaluating: temporal split is correct, feature parity is enforced, Tobit imputation is training-only. The 3-month validation window could lead to overfitting hyperparameters, but both models share this constraint. No asymmetric flaw. Verdict: defense_wins.
assessor_2_raw: The demand censoring via Tobit is the most interesting methodological aspect. It is correctly described as a preprocessing step fit on training data. Both models receive identically pre-processed labels. No flaw introduced. Verdict: defense_wins.
assessor_3_raw: The quantile modeling asymmetry (TFT joint vs LightGBM separate) is inherent to the architectures and correctly captured by WQL aggregation. No bias introduced. Verdict: defense_wins.
adjudication_raw: All 3 assessors independently reached defense_wins. Unanimous verdict. Verdict: defense_wins.
